name: Chinese Link Checker & Fixer - Hourly
description: Check if all Chinese HTML files have links only to Chinese versions. If not, fix them automatically and report changes.

payload.content:
STEP 1: Read and execute /root/.openclaw/workspace/mindfulness/chinese_link_fixer.py - This script checks all 12 Chinese HTML files for links to English versions and fixes them automatically.

STEP 2: The script will output either:
- 'Fixed N links: [list of changes]' (if fixes were made)
- 'All Chinese files have correct links. No fixes needed.' (if all good)

STEP 3: If fixes were made, commit and push the changes to GitHub:
- cd /root/.openclaw/workspace/mindfulness
- git add *.html
- git commit -m 'Auto-fix: Update Chinese file links to point to Chinese versions'
- git push origin main

STEP 4: SEND a summary to Telegram using the message tool:
- Report how many files were checked (12)
- Report how many links were fixed (if any)
- If no fixes needed, report that all links are correct
